LAW AND MOTION 301, MR. BLIGHT DID NOT GIVE NOTICE TO THE OPPOSING PARTY OF HIS INTENT TO ARGUE THE MATTER. THEREFORE, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS SCOTT DREXEL, THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF APPEARS TO BE ASKING THIS COURT TO REVIEW ACTIONS TAKEN BY THE SUPERIOR COURT OF SAN MATEO COUNTY OR SANTA CLARA COUNTY, ANOTHER DEPARTMENTS OF THIS COURT OR DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS OF THE STATE BAR. THIS COURT DOES NOT HAVE JURISDICTION TO REVIEW OR CORRECT ANY SUCH ACTIONS THEREFORE, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED. PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN 10 DAYS IF HE CAN ALLEGE IN GOOD FAITH A CLAIM THAT IS WITHIN THIS COURT'S JURISDICTION. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2008 Continued To Dec-26-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Strike The Demurrer In Part, Or In Alternative Chage Of Venue
Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
HARVEY BLIGHT, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, (650)364-1374, PLAINTIFF
NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY THE COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS SCOTT DREXAL, THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA

MR. BLIGHT DID NOT GIVE NOTICE TO THE OPPOSING PARTY OF HIS INTENT TO ARGUE THE MATTER. THEREFORE, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF HARVEY BLIGHT'S Motion To Strike The Demurrer In Part, Or In Alternative Chage Of Venue. PLAINTIFF APPEARS TO BE ASKING THIS COURT TO REVIEW ACTIONS TAKEN BY THE SUPERIOR COURT OF SAN MATEO COUNTY OR SANTA CLARA COUNTY, ANOTHER DEPARTMENTS OF THIS COURT OR DISCIPLINARY ACTIONS OF THE STATE BAR. THIS COURT DOES NOT HAVE JURISDICTION TO REVIEW OR CORRECT ANY SUCH ACTIONS THEREFORE, THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED. PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN 10 DAYS IF HE CAN ALLEGE IN GOOD FAITH A CLAIM THAT IS WITHIN THIS COURT'S JURISDICTION. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 (301/PJB/ER)
